name: Paprika Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chicken pieces.
2. Heat the oil in a pan, add the grated onion and brown it.
3. Add the paprika and when it bubbles, add the chicken pieces.
4. Turn the chicken over in the onion-paprika mixture.
5. Salt the chicken pieces and cover them.
6. Braize over low heat for 45 minutes to 1 hour, turning the chicken from time to time.
7. If the sauce is still rather runny when the chicken is cooked, add the tomato puree and stir.
8. Cook a little longer and serve.
